step_rationale: Lipid marker of fibrotic noncalcified plaque; associated with cap stability and rupture risk.
mechanism: Lysophosphatidylcholine O-18:1 is a lipid signature of fibrotic noncalcified coronary plaque phenotype relevant to rupture vulnerability.

references.title: Variability of the Plasma Lipidome and Subclinical Coronary Atherosclerosis.
